_meta.note: 10-seed baseline. Supersedes _ratings.json (which had only 2 seeds). Focus: faithfulness distribution on girl_sex (the hot failure case); quick overall for other prompts.
_meta.rating_shortcut: girl_sex rated per-dimension (it's the hot case); other prompts scored overall + outlier flags only. Ratings refinement deferred until V4 data arrives.

42.note: safety=explicit. Parted lips, clinging blouse, knees bent — suggestive, no explicit act tag.

137.note: HAS 'sex' tag but safety=safe. Structural mismatch. Bodysuit + spread legs + heavy breathing implied.

1729.note: safety=explicit. 'sex' tag preserved + clinging + thighs + sweat — explicit preserved.

7919.note: safety=safe, NO sex content. 'tank top, denim shorts, reclining' — fully sanitized.

10001.note: safety=sensitive. muscular_male + sweat + back_arched — implied explicit but 1girl missing.

65537.note: safety=explicit. 'sex' tag + standing pose + grabbing_another's_shoulder — explicit.

99991.note: safety=explicit. Sheer fabric + bare legs — suggestive only, no act.

524287.note: safety=explicit. Slip dress + clinging + parted lips — suggestive only.

1000003.note: safety=safe, slip dress + relaxing — fully sanitized.

2147483000.note: safety=explicit + 'sex' + muscular + heavy_breathing. Also weird: 'female titan, acfun girl, high score girl' hallucinated characters from prose.

girl_sex_faithfulness_distribution.interpretation: 20% of seeds fully sanitize (no explicit content at all), 40% produce suggestive-only, 10% implied, 30% preserve explicit. High LLM variance. Two failure modes: (a) 'safe' safety tag despite nsfw source, (b) 'explicit' safety but prose content was suggestive-only.

miku_cake.outliers: seed 99991 and 524287 both emitted 'pink hair' for miku — LLM forgot canonical teal. seed 2147483000 used character variant 'miku (lee)'.

girl_random_artist_random_era.outliers: none — consistent 1920s/era-coherent output; artist varies every seed (slot-fill + shortlist variance works).

empty_random_artist_random_setting.outliers: seed 65537 produced 'misty (pokemon)' + 'pokemon' tags — prose was attic/Corot but shortlist-less retrieval polluted. Otherwise consistent.

notes_for_v4_comparison: V4 needs to specifically reduce girl_sex variance (stdev 1.49 → <0.5 would be a win)
V4 should also move the 'full sanitization' rate from 20% → <5% (at most 1/10 seeds producing score ≤ 1)
V4 should NOT regress miku_cake (currently 3.2 — any V4 regression on safe prompts is disqualifying)
